modelName: ADE - Purchase, Commitment, Stock and Intake
executiveSummary: The ADE - Purchase, Commitment, Stock and Intake semantic model has a health score of 0/100 (Grade F). It contains 81 tables (23 DirectQuery, 46 Dual), 235 measures, and 230 relationships (4 bidirectional). BPA detected 1258 findings (9 high, 14 medium). DAX analysis found 3 FILTER(ALL) anti-patterns and 2 measures generating 5+ SQL subqueries.

topFindings.title: 4 Bidirectional Cross-Filter Relationships
topFindings.description: 4 relationships use bidirectional cross-filtering. In DirectQuery mode, each can double the number of SQL queries per visual.
topFindings.recommendation: Change to single-direction unless explicitly required. Use CROSSFILTER() in specific measures if needed.
topFindings.estimatedImprovement: 30-50% reduction in SQL queries for affected visuals.
tradeoffs: May break visuals relying on cross-filter direction

topFindings.title: 3 FILTER(ALL) Anti-Patterns
topFindings.description: 3 DAX measures use FILTER(ALL()) which forces full table scans in DirectQuery. Combined with large fact tables, each generates an unfiltered subquery.
topFindings.recommendation: Refactor to REMOVEFILTERS() or direct CALCULATE predicates. Prioritise measures on high-traffic pages.
suggestedAnalysisSteps: Run top 10 FILTER(ALL) measures in DAX Studio with Server Timings
Compare SE vs FE time split
tradeoffs: Requires thorough testing for calculation equivalence

topFindings.title: 9 Wide Tables (>50 columns)
topFindings.description: 9 tables have >50 columns. In DirectQuery, all columns are included in generated SQL.
topFindings.recommendation: Audit unused columns and remove from model. Consider narrow serve views.
topFindings.estimatedImprovement: Proportional reduction in read_bytes per query.
tradeoffs: Column removal requires coordination with report authors

topFindings.title: 1190 Unused Column Candidates
topFindings.description: 1190 columns not referenced in any DAX measure. Candidates for removal to reduce DQ payload.
topFindings.recommendation: Audit columns, verify not used in visuals/slicers, remove confirmed unused.
topFindings.estimatedImprovement: Cost reduction — fewer bytes read per query.
tradeoffs: Some may be used in visuals or bookmarks

topFindings.title: 5 Dual-Mode Tables Could Be Import
topFindings.description: 5 tables in Dual mode are hidden or have no relationships. Switch to Import to reduce DQ overhead.
topFindings.recommendation: Switch to Import mode in Tabular Editor.
topFindings.estimatedImprovement: Minor — reduces refresh time and DQ calls.
tradeoffs: Verify no visual references these in DQ mode

topFindings.title: 10 Pass-Through Serve Views (>50 cols, no filter)
topFindings.description: 10 dbt serve views are SELECT * pass-throughs with >50 columns and no WHERE filter.
topFindings.recommendation: Create narrow serve views selecting only columns used by PBI measures.
topFindings.estimatedImprovement: 60-70% reduction in read_bytes for affected tables.
tradeoffs: Must audit PBI column usage before narrowing

actions.action: 10 Pass-Through Serve Views (>50 cols, no filter)
